description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, set on a green lawn with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows on the front facade allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house features a spacious outdoor terrace or patio area, partially covered by a transparent or glass canopy, ideal for outdoor seating or dining. The main entryway is defined by a simple door with glass panels and is flanked by potted plants, giving a welcoming appearance. The rear and side facades are more solid, with fewer or no windows, emphasizing privacy. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, characteristic of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large front windows, and a spacious terrace under a glass canopy. The design is minimalist and geometric, set on a green lawn with a paved entry path.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a mostly solid black wall with minimal openings, highlighting the private side of the house and the terrace area under the glass canopy.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance with glass-paneled door, large windows, potted plants, and the paved walkway leading up to the house.
description_view_2: The left side view reveals a blank white wall with no windows, emphasizing privacy, and a clear view of the terrace and glass canopy.
description_view_3: The back view shows a solid black wall with no windows, and the interior layout is partially visible, including the terrace and some interior furnishings.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on front, minimal or no windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Simple glass-paneled door with potted plants, no steps or porch, minimalist and functional
